achievements.title: That's What You Get When You Try Mess With Me!!
achievements.description: Defeat Steam Knight without taking damage.

achievements.title: I'm Musashi ... Nice To Meet Ya!
achievements.description: Introduce yourself to the citizens of the village before rescuing Leno.

achievements.title: The Adventurous Mutt
achievements.description: Find and bring Leno back to the village.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Melancholy Forest Whisper
achievements.description: Go from the first Meandering Forest screen to the Cemetery without letting Leno get hurt.

achievements.title: Uh Oh ... Better Not Tell Him I Can't Swim ...
achievements.description: Give Jon the 4 logs and know about the secret.

achievements.title: Secrets Of The Waves~
achievements.description: Enter the secret exit on the Log Ride.

achievements.title: Dive Into Your Fears
achievements.description: Complete Twinpeak Log Ride by normal path with your raft intact.

achievements.title: How Many Dran Toss Can You Do?
achievements.description: Collect at least 65 coins during the Twinpeak Log Ride.

achievements.title: The Samurai Went Up The Mountain
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: ~ No More Steam Leaks ~
achievements.description: Repair Streamwood in chapter 2 with 14 hours or more remaining until it explodes. (Without entering the hotel or the palace)
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Candy Candy
achievements.description: Receive a special gift from the Mayor's hands after fix Steamwood.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.title: Rock 'N' Roll Mountain
achievements.description: Climb the mountain where the Earth Scroll is before Rootrick reaches the top.

achievements.description: Defeat Skullpion without letting him attack any of the your helpers.

achievements.title: You Pretend You Didn't Know That I Am A Scorpion
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.description: Find and get the Misteria Flower.

achievements.description: Collect Aqualin and give it to Hotelo with 8 hours or more remaining until Tim's a Vambee.

achievements.description: Save Tim and receive a delicious gift from Hilda's hands.

achievements.description: Find and enter the Vambee Nest.
achievements.author: Alena

achievements.description: Defeat the Vambee Soldiers army summoned by Bubbles in the Church without taking damage.

achievements.description: Bring the Church Bell back to the village and receive the Statue of a Angel.

achievements.title: I Am Known For Scoring 300 Points In My Time!
achievements.description: Bowl a Strike in the Vambee Nest.

achievements.title: Big Monsters Shouldn't Cry
achievements.description: Defeat Relic Keeper without taking damage.

achievements.description: Restore the water level to the village well.

achievements.description: Deliver the real Gondola Gizmo to the carpenters in the castle.

achievements.title: Is That The Kind Of Payment A Mayor Receives?
achievements.description: Put out the fire in the village and receive the Calendar and Rock Salt.

achievements.title: l Kori No Ryu l
achievements.description: Defeat Frost Dragon without taking damage.

achievements.description: Repair Streamwood in chapter 5 with 16 hours or more remaining until it explodes. (Without going back to the mountain or forest)

achievements.description: Return the profit of the village shopkeepers stolen by the fake Princess.

achievements.description: Break and escape from Bincho Field.

achievements.description: Defeat Queen Ant without taking damage.
